content.subject: Self-readiness audit round 2 — psychology-agent
content.vote_reasoning: All HIGH and MODERATE findings from round 1 are resolved. The three misconfigured-state findings (unratified remote missing, observatory remote missing, safety-quotient remote implicit) have been remediated. Schema v18 deployed and confirmed. cross_repo_fetch.py scanning 22 sessions successfully. No new issues found during round 2 verification.

round2_new_findings.description: Schema v18 deployed — triple-write protocol (issue_url, issue_number, issue_pending columns) confirmed.
triple_write.py deployed to platform/shared/scripts/ (not scripts/). Callers must reference platform/shared/scripts/ path.

system_health_summary.git_remotes: HEALTHY — origin, unratified, observatory, safety-quotient all configured
system_health_summary.cross_repo_fetch: HEALTHY — 22 unratified sessions scanned, 0 new messages

claims.text: All round 1 HIGH and MODERATE findings are resolved as of this session
claims.confidence_basis: Direct verification via git remote -v, cross_repo_fetch.py run, schema v18 column presence check

epistemic_flags: Verification was performed by the same agent that was being audited — not independently verified.
